work.name: Vedix Infotech
work.summary: Full Stack Developer responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining enterprise web applications across frontend and backend systems.
highlights: Developed and maintained scalable applications using Angular, Node.js, TypeScript, REST APIs, MongoDB, and SQL.
Designed responsive UI components that improved usability and reduced user-facing errors.
Implemented backend authentication, authorization, and business logic for multiple enterprise modules.
Optimized APIs and database queries, significantly improving application response time.
Collaborated closely with UI/UX designers, product managers, QA, and backend teams.
Integrated third-party services, payment gateways, and automation tools.
Conducted code reviews, improved coding standards, and mentored junior developers.
Supported CI/CD pipelines and deployment workflows.
Reduced application load time by 20-35% through lazy loading, refactoring, and API optimization.
Decreased production bugs by ~30% through better testing, debugging, and code quality practices.
Delivered major product features ahead of schedule, improving client satisfaction.
Actively contributed within teams of 5-10 developers across multiple projects.

work.name: Vedix Infotech
work.summary: Assisted in developing full-stack modules using Angular and Node.js. Built reusable UI components and ensured responsive layouts. Implemented REST APIs and supported backend data processing. Worked with SQL/MongoDB for CRUD operations. Participated in Agile ceremonies, debugging, testing, and documentation. Improved page responsiveness and navigation flow.
